title: pentacalia huamaliensis
intro: Pentacalia huamaliensis, also known as the Huamalí pentacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pentacalia huamaliensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, as well as its potential to prevent the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of administration, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
